title: Junior Java Backend developer
description:
We are looking for a motivated Junior Backend Engineer to join our engineering team. You will help build, test, and maintain reliable server-side applications and APIs while learning best practices for software development in a production environment. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams including frontend, product, DevOps, and QA to deliver robust backend services that power our web and mobile applications.
Required Qualifications
Master's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or related field.
0–2 years of professional backend development experience (internships included).
Basic understanding of at least one backend language: Python / Java / JavaScript (Node.js) / Go / C#.
Familiarity with REST APIs and web service concepts.
Basic knowledge of SQL and relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.).
Familiar with Spring\SpringMVC framework and understand the principles of IOC and AOP.
Familiar with persistence layer frameworks such as Hibernate\MyBaits.
